found_interesting: The fragility of life and connections
The beauty in imperfection and repair
The human need for connection, knowledge, and understanding
wants_to_explore: How to mend broken relationships and communities
The intersection of technology and humanity
The role of art in healing and growth
entries.reflection: In a world full of fragile connections, the beauty lies in the imperfect repairs we make. Kintsugi Souls aims to explore how humans mend their broken relationships, communities, and selves through art, technology, and philosophy.
